title: YouTube’s AI content labels are getting a much-needed makeover
description: YouTube is moving AI disclosure labels to a more visible spot and rolling out auto-detection for AI-generated content starting May 2026. Here's what changes for creators and viewers.

title: Box beats Q1 revenue estimates as AI product adoption lifts growth to 10.7%, stock falls
description: Box posted Q1 revenue of $305.9 million, up 10.7% year over year, and raised full-year guidance to $1.28 billion. The stock fell anyway, as investors questioned whether the growth rate will hold.

title: JD Vance Has Unexpected Reaction to Pope Leo’s AI Warning
description: In a surprising turn of events, JD Vance has shared a supportive response to Pope Leo XIV‘s encyclical regarding AI. The vice president, during a recent interview, addressed Pope Leo’s call to adopt regulations on the growth of artificial intelligence, wherein he described the Vatican City leader’s assessment as “profound.” JD Vance reacts to Pope [...] The post JD Vance Has Unexpected Reaction to Pope Leo’s AI Warning appeared first on Mandatory .

title: AINewsBreaks – Redwood AI Corp. (CSE: AIRX) (OTCQB: RDWCF) (Frankfurt: Y0N) (WKN: A422EZ) Gains DTC Eligibility, Engages IBN for Investor Awareness Campaign
Amazon is licensing its AI shopping technology to other retailers through AWS
description: The AWS Agentic Shopping Assistant packages the architecture behind Alexa for Shopping, and Kate Spade has already deployed it
